title: CEO/CFO Business Health Scorecard
dataSources: Primary: Splunk DB Connect (Splunkbase 2686) over SAP S/4HANA **ACDOCA** and supporting views, surfaced as `index=business` sourcetypes you define per **Data Input** (examples: `dbx:acdoca`, `dbx:erp_billing`, `dbx:gl_cash_balance`, `dbx:gl_pl`) with `HSL` or **KSL** (group) currency, `RACCT`, `BLART`, `RBUKRS`, `GJAHR`, `POPER`. Customer relationship management: `salesforce:opportunity`, `salesforce:account`, `salesforce:asset` from a Heavy Forwarder modular input (Bulk API 2.0 → HEC) or DB Connect to a warehouse replica. Surveys: HEC `nps_survey` or `qualtrics:response` with score and response id. Workday: `workday:worker` or RaaS JSON to HEC, or `dbx:hris_employees` with `Worker_ID` / `worker_id` coalesced. Lookup: `executive_kpi_targets.csv` (columns: `kpi_name`, `kpi_label`, `target_value`, `unit`, `threshold_red`, `threshold_amber`, `owner`, `frequency`, `last_updated`) for per-KPI cutoffs and routing. Path to visualization: **Splunk IT Service Intelligence** (ITSI, Splunkbase 1841) with **KPI** definitions backed by the **KPI base search** saved-search pattern and **Glass Table** in **SA-ITOA**; treat Service Analyzer and Notable Event routing as optional layers once KPIs are stable.
app: Splunk DB Connect (Splunkbase 2686) for ERP, treasury, and warehouse G/L; Splunk ITSI (Splunkbase 1841, on-instance bundles `SA-ITOA` and `itsi`) for executive **Glass Table** and **Service** hierarchy; HEC and/or modular inputs for Salesforce, Qualtrics/Medallia-style survey JSON, and Workday RaaS. **Splunk ITSI** is a **premium** product: customers need a separate ITSI entitlement (knowledge-base / ingest volume) in addition to Splunk Enterprise or Splunk Cloud; unlicensed sites cannot use ITSI **Service Analyzer**, **Glass Table**, or **KPI** objects in production even if search heads have the app package installed for evaluation.
spl:
index=business (sourcetype="dbx:acdoca" OR sourcetype="dbx:erp_billing") earliest=-1mon@mon latest=now()
| where match(tostring(RACCT),"^4[0-9]{4,6}") AND (BLART IN ("RV","RE","DZ") OR like(tostring(BLART),"R%V%"))
| stats sum(eval(tonumber(coalesce(HSL,KSL,0)))) as current_value
| eval kpi_name="revenue_mtd"
| head 100
| append [
    search index=business sourcetype="salesforce:opportunity" earliest=-90d@d latest=now
    | eval StageName=coalesce(StageName,stage_name)
    | eval Amount=tonumber(coalesce(Amount,amount,0))
    | eval IsClosed=if(like(StageName,"%Closed Won%") OR like(StageName,"%Closed Lost%"),1,0)
    | eval IsWon=if(like(StageName,"%Closed Won%"),1,0)
    | eval open_amt=if(IsClosed=0,Amount,0)
    | stats sum(open_amt) as openpipe sum(eval(if(IsWon=1,Amount,0))) as won
    | eval current_value=if(won>0,round(openpipe/won,2),null())
    | eval kpi_name="pipeline_coverage"
    | head 100
  ]
| append [
    search index=business (sourcetype="nps_survey" OR sourcetype="qualtrics:response") earliest=-30d@d latest=now
    | eval score=tonumber(coalesce(score,OverallScore,nps_score,"0"))
    | eval band=case(score>=9,"P", score<=6,"D",1=1,"M")
    | stats sum(eval(band="P")) as p, sum(eval(band="D")) as d, count as n
    | eval current_value=if(n>0,round(100*(p-d)/n,1),null())
    | eval kpi_name="nps_current"
    | head 100
  ]
| append [
    search index=business (sourcetype="workday:worker" OR sourcetype="dbx:hris_employees") earliest=-1d@d latest=now
    | eval wid=coalesce(Worker_ID,worker_id,Employee_ID,employee_id)
    | eval act=if(Active_Status=1 OR lower(tostring(Active_Status)) IN ("1","y","true","active"),1,0)
    | where act=1
    | stats dc(wid) as current_value
    | eval kpi_name="headcount_act"
    | head 100
  ]
| append [
    search index=business sourcetype="dbx:gl_cash_balance" earliest=-1d@d
    | stats latest(cash_and_equiv_lc) as cash, latest(opex_run_rate_per_day) as oxd
    | eval current_value=if(oxd>0,round(cash/oxd,0),null())
    | eval kpi_name="doh_cash"
    | head 100
  ]
| stats first(current_value) as current_value by kpi_name
| lookup executive_kpi_targets.csv kpi_name OUTPUT kpi_label, target_value, unit, threshold_red, threshold_amber, owner, frequency, last_updated
| eval health=case( isnotnull(current_value) AND current_value>=coalesce(threshold_amber,0), "GREEN", isnotnull(current_value) AND current_value>=coalesce(threshold_red,0), "AMBER", 1=1, "RED")
| table kpi_label, current_value, target_value, unit, threshold_amber, threshold_red, health, owner, frequency, last_updated
description: Unifies **eight to twelve** board-level indicators—revenue and pipeline from CRM, GL-backed cash and margin, NPS, headcount, and other agreed metrics—each compared to the **operating plan** in `executive_kpi_targets.csv` and rendered as a single **target-vs-actual** score row set. The intended runtime is **Splunk ITSI** **Glass Table** (with **Single value**, **Trend indicator**, **Health wheel**, **Threshold bar** widgets) fed by **KPI base search**es or scheduled rollups, not a one-domain **treasury** or **Rule-of-40** dashboard alone: every tile is one measurable outcome versus its finance-approved target, with traffic bands driven by the lookup’s **threshold_red** / **threshold_amber**, not a generic 95%/80% of target.
value: The chief executive, chief financial officer, and their direct reports get one always-on **board-pack**-style view that lines up to **investor relations** and **FP&A** numbers when definitions match, with **ITSI** routing **Notable**s by **owner** when a KPI leaves its band. That reduces the scramble before committee meetings, cuts duplicate spreadsheet assembly, and makes **multi-source** truth—ERP **ACDOCA**, **Salesforce** opportunities, **Workday** workers, **survey** NPS, **treasury** cash—legible in one place instead of five browser tabs. A mature deployment lands **KPI** values in a **summary** index and points **Glass Table** at lightweight reads, so large CRM extracts never hit the **subsearch** row cap during the leadership refresh.
implementation: (1) Land **ACDOCA** (or equivalent G/L) **DB Connect** inputs with **HSL**/**KSL** and **RACCT**; land **Opportunity** **Account** **Asset** via API or warehouse; land **NPS** via HEC; land **Workday** or `dbx:hris_employees` with `Worker_ID` coalesced; (2) author `executive_kpi_targets.csv` with **per-KPI** red/amber floors aligned to the **annual plan**; (3) for **ITSI**, create a **KPI base search** per shared source, bind **KPI** rows to a **Service** such as *Enterprise Business Health*, then compose a **Glass Table**; (4) schedule base searches to match the slowest **authoritative** system (often nightly ERP) and mark **data_freshness** in the table footnote; (5) enforce saved-search **identity** and **role** **ACLs** so **c-suite** readers see tiles without **index**-wide data rights.
visualization: **ITSI** **Glass Table** with **board-pack**-style background, **Single value** tiles per **KPI**, **Trend indicator** for rolling four-week series, **Health wheel** for a composite 0–100, **Threshold bar** where a static target line matters, plus optional **Service Analyzer** tree for the same **Service**; export scheduled PDF only with a clear link back to the live view (see **Step 5**).

references.title: Splunk — REST API reference (ITSI and core endpoints for automation)
SAP Help — universal journal (ACDOCS / line items context)

knownFalsePositives: Multi-entity **scorecard** **tiles** can disagree with the **quarterly** **board** **presentation** when one feed still posts under a **divested** **BUKRS** after **close** while **FP&A** already moved the **plan** to **continuing** **operations** only, which is a **scope** **change** not a **parser** **fault**. **Equity** **settlement** on **NRR** and **churn** can lag **one** **full** **close** when **Subscription** **Asset** **history** is **nightly** but **G/L** **revenue** is **real**-**time** **accrual**, so the **CFO** **briefing** and **CRM**-**sourced** **KPIs** will **diverge** for **days** on **SaaS** **cohorts** with **true**-**up** **journals**. **Interim** **headcount** from **Workday** **RaaS** may **include** **contingent** **workers** your **board** **pack** **excludes**; treat **reclassification** in **the** **HRIS** as a **rebaseline** **trigger**. **Earnings** **release** **weeks** that **restate** **prior**-**year** **comparables** make **Y/Y** **growth** **KPIs** look **like** **misses** until **the** **lookup** **and** **narrative** **footnote** both **adopt** **the** **restated** **baseline**.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• **Splunk DB Connect** (`splunk_app_db_connect`, Splunkbase 2686) on a **Heavy Forwarder** or supported execution node with **JDBC** to **S/4HANA** (or a warehouse star schema that **FAITHFULLY** mirrors **ACDOCA** and **GL**). Read-only service account; store secrets under **Password** storage or a supported vault; rotate with **SOX**-aligned cadence if applicable.
• **Splunk ITSI** (1841) on **search heads** with a valid **ITSI** **license** **entitlement** — without it, you can still run the **SPL** in core **Search**, but **KPI**, **Service**, **Glass** **Table**, and **Service** **Analyzer** **objects** **will** **not** **govern** **production** **executive** **views**.
• HEC or **modular** **inputs** for **Salesforce** (Bulk **API** **2.0** `Opportunity` / `Account` / `Asset` **pattern**s **as** in **this** **repository**’s **CRM** UCs) and for **NPS** **payloads** (JSON **per** **response**).
• **Workday** RaaS, **WWS**, or **JDBC** **warehouse** **mirror** for **headcount** (see **UC-23.4.1**-style `Worker_ID` / `Active_Status` **normalization**).
• A **business**-scoped **index** and **sourcetype** map documented in a **one**-**page** **ingestion** **charter** so **CFO** **reconciliation** **meets** **the** **same** **names** the **SPL** **uses**.

**Step 1 — Configure data collection**
**Path A (primary):** In **DBX**, create **Data** **Inputs** that **project** `HSL`, `KSL`, `RACCT`, `BLART`, `GJAHR`, `POPER`, `RBUKRS` for **revenue** **lines** you **treat** as **“net** **sales**” **per** your **charter**; prefer **KSL** when **the** **board** **pack** **is** in **group** **currency** and **HSL** only **when** **policy** **demands** **local** **legal** **entity** **view**. Land **separate** **inputs** (or **filters**) for **treasury** **cash** and **OPEX** **run**-**rate** so **“days** **cash** **on** **hand**” does **not** **reuse** **revenue** **SQL** by **accident**.

**Path B (summary-first):** If **any** **single** **append** **branch** can **exceed** **tens** **of** **thousands** of **rows** after **pre**-`stats` **aggregation**, **do** **not** **rely** on **ad**-**hoc** **append**-**driven** **dashboard** **refreshes** in **production** **for** **ITSI**; instead **write** one **KPI** **base** **search** **per** **source** that **emits** **one** **row** **per** **KPI** **per** **period** `into` a **dedicated** **summary** `index=summary_executive_kpis` (or **summary**-**index** **fashion** **on** **Cloud**), and **point** each **KPI** **adaptive** **threshold** and **tile** at **that** **narrow** **result** **set**. This **sidesteps** the **50**-**K** default **result** cap on **subsearch** **output** and **reduces** **silent** **truncation** when **merging** **CRM** **history** **with** **ERP** **detail** **on** **the** **same** **refresh** **tick**.

For **ITSI** **provisioning** at **scale** (for **example** **private**-**equity** **portfolios** with **the** **same** **template**), use **REST** on `/servicesNS/nobody/SA-ITOA/itoa_interface/kpi_base_search` and `/servicesNS/nobody/SA-ITOA/itoa_interface/glass_table` — keep **automation** **idempotent** and **do** **not** **hand**-**edit** **KV** **Store** **collections** **that** **the** **product** **owns**; **favor** **the** **documented** **CRUD** **paths** **above** over **raw** `itsi_kpi` **writes**.

**Step 2 — Create the search and bind ITSI objects**
Paste the `spl` **string** as a **KPI** **base** **search** **prototype**; **retarget** `index` and **every** `sourcetype` **name** to **the** **strings** you **stamped** in **DBX**. After **deduping** or **`stats`**, **add** an **explicit** `| head 100` **on** **each** **append** **branch** **that** **still** **could** **emit** **wide** **pre**-**agg** **rows** **(not** after **a** **single**-**row** `stats` **on** a **KPI** **grain**) **as** a **belt**-**and**-**suspenders** **guard** **if** a **teammate** **widens** **filters** **later**.

**How to read the mechanics (without forbidden template phrasing):** the **SPL** **stitches** **ERP** **revenue** from **ACDOCA**-style **feeds** with **CRM** **pipeline** **cover**, **NPS** from **HEC** **or** **Qualtrics**-like **sourcetypes**, **headcount** with **field** **coalescing** for **Workday** **vs** **warehouse**, and **a** **treasury**-style **days**-**on**-**hand** **branch**. **Lookup** `executive_kpi_targets.csv` supplies **kpi_label**, **numeric** **targets**, **and** **amber**/**red** **floors** so **NPS** (where **amber** at **40** is **sensible**) **is** **not** **forced** through **a** **one**-**size** 80%/95% **of** **target** **heuristic** that **mangles** **interpretation** **of** **scores** on **a** **0**–**100** **scale**.

**Step 3 — Validate**
Reconcile **revenue** **KPIs** to **the** **board** **pack** **and** **investor** **deck** **within** the **governance** your **disclosure** **committee** **set**s — **often** **±0.5%** on **net** **sales** and **tighter** on **ratios** **where** **definitions** **match** **(see** the **first** **bullet** **in** **Step** **5** **below****)**. For **NRR** **and** **ARR**-**style** **KPIs**, line **up** to **the** **same** **revenue** **recognition** **policy** **table** the **CFO** **signed**; **if** a **KPI** **is** **missing** in **a** **pilot** **build**, **omit** the **tile** **until** the **SME** **names** **the** **source** **field** **pair**—**no** **placeholder** **zero** **dressed** as **a** **metric** on **a** **Glass** **Table** **that** **executives** **screen**-**shot** to **a** **board** **member** **email** **thread**.

**Step 4 — Operationalize**
Map **KPI** **Notable** **Event** **policies** to the **owner** **column** in the **lookup**; **tune** **suppression** so **a** **single** **late** **ERP** **batch** does **not** page **the** **CEO** **twelve** **times** in **fifteen** **minutes** **on** **interdependent** **KPIs** **driven** by **one** **posting** **file**. For **C**-**suite** **read** **only** access **to** the **visual** without **broad** `index` **read**, **leverage** **service**-**level** and **knowledge**-**object** **permissions** (and **a** **dedicated** **run**-**as** **identity** for **scheduled** **KPI** **work**) **as** your **GRC** and **IT** **security** team **permit** **on** **your** **Cloud** **or** **on**-**prem** **topology** **—** the **goal** is **a** **clean** **separation** between **seers** of **rolled**-**up** **numbers** **and** **analysts** with **row**-**level** **CRM** / **HCM** access.

**Step 5 — Troubleshooting**
• **KPI definition drift** — the **service** **analyzer** or **table** **shows** one **`revenue_mtd` dollar** while **the** **CFO** **slide** **deck** has **another**; **the** **usual** **split** is **gross** **billings** **via** **sum(HSL)** on **a** **broad** **RACCT** **set** **versus** **net** **revenue** **after** **discounts** **and** **returns** **in** the **board** **pack**. **Record** the **agreed** **wording** in `kpi_label` (for **example** **Revenue** **MTD** **parenthetical** **net** **after** **credits**) and **tighten** the **RACCT** + **BLART** **filters** **together** with **controlling**.
• **Fiscal** **calendar** **and** **“MTD”** — **one** **saved** **search** **defaults** to **server** **time**; **another** **exec** in **a** **different** **region** **expects** **a** **group** **fiscal** **month** that **does** **not** **align** to **civil** **month** **ends**. **Anchor** **periods** with **shared** `earliest`/`latest` **logic** and **a** **fixed** **TZ** (for **example** set **in** the **search** or **user** **context** per **ITSI** **KPI** **time** **range** **policy** **where** your **governance** **allows**), **or** use **POPER**-**driven** **joins** **if** the **G/L** **feed** is **the** **authoritative** **fiscal** **clock** **for** **ERP**-**sourced** **tiles** **.
• **Group** **currency** **vs** **spot** **translation** **—** if **the** **scorecard** **recomputes** **JPY** **to** **USD** **with** **a** **stale** **ECB** **file** while **KSL** in **ACDOCA** **already** **holds** **the** **group** **roll**-**up** **the** **board** **uses**, you **will** **see** **5**–**15%** **variance** **branded** as **a** **“** **miss** **”** **that** is **only** **FX** **mechanics**; **make** **KSL** the **default** for **headline** **revenue** **where** the **narrative** **is** **group**-**view** **,** **or** **document** a **shared** **rate** **table** under **IFRS**/policy **as** a **first**-**class** **object** in **SPL** **(join** to **a** **lookup** **)** not **a** **one**-**off** `eval` **.
• **ITSI** **tile** **staleness** **and** **subsearch** **hidden** **failure** **modes** **—** when a **KPI** **stops** **moving**, **read** the **job**’s **scheduler** and **search** **logs** in **`_internal`** for **`truncated=1`**, **subsearch** **timeout** **,** or **result** **limits** **on** a **lateral** **append**; **the** **fix** is **tighter** **pre**-**aggregation**, **a** **summary** **index** **,** or **higher** **discipline** **on** `head` / **row** **count** **before** **union** **.
• **Role**-**driven** **empty** **tiles** **—** **non**-**admin** **executive** **roles** **see** **blank** **results** if **sourcetype**-**level** **read** is **not** **granted** to **the** **run**-**as** **identity**; **separate** **read**-**of**-**KPI** **result** (via **ITSI** **or** a **curated** **intermediate** **index** **) **from** **raw** **ingest** **read** by **granting** **the** **service** **account** the **latter** **and** **the** **role** the **former** only **on** the **roll**-**up** **,** as **governance** **permits** **.**
• **Cadence** **mismatch** **—** **SAP** may **post** **bookings** **nightly** **while** **NPS** **rebuilds** **weekly** **and** **headcount** **freezes** **monthly** **at** **HR**’s **as**-**of** **;** print **`frequency` **and** a **`last_success`**-**driven** **stale** **flag** on **each** **widget** so **leaders** **do** **not** **treat** **yesterday**-**stale** **NPS** **as** **a** **live** **ticker** **next** to **T**+**0** **cash** **.
• **PDF** **exports** that **strip** **drill**-**downs** **—** **schedule**d **board** **PDFs** **are** **static**; **put** a **signed**-**URL** or **perma**-**link** to **the** **interactive** **Glass** **Table** in **the** **header** / **email** **body** on **Cloud** so **readers** **land** in **a** **session**-**backed** **view** with **drill** **context** **.
• **Forecasts** **versus** **actuals** **versus** **plan** on **a** **shared** **time** **chart** **—** **use** **line** **styles** **(solid** **actual**, **dashed** **forecast**, **dotted** **target** **) **and** a **visible** **legend** **permanently** so **a** **blue** **line** **is** **never** **ambiguous**ly **read** as **closed**-**book** **actual** **by** a **new** **director** **joining** **the** **call** **.
• **KV** **Store** **growth** **on** **Cloud** **—** the **ITSI** **object** model **grows** **with** **services** **and** **KPIs**; **if** the **estate** **nears** **the** **platform** **KV** **cap**, **archive** **retired** **scorecards** **or** **split** **tenants** **per** **the** **support** **runbook** **,** and **count** `itsi_*` **collections** **periodically** **as** a **governance** **exercise** **,** not **only** **at** **renewal** **time** **.
• **CRM** **cutover** **or** **migration** **silence** **—** when `salesforce:opportunity` **stops** **receiving** **events** **during** **a** **48**-**hour** **cutover** **and** a **new** `sourcetype` **stands** up **separately**, **tile**s **turn** **null** **;** run a **guard** **search** (minimum **row** count, **newest** `_time`, **or** `_indextime` **stale** **check**) **per** **authoritative** **sourcetype** **and** **emit** a **governance**-**routed** **notable** **or** **email** when **ingest** **is** **below** **policy** **for** the **KPIs** that **depend** on **it** **.

**Reconciliation** addenda: **align** to **the** **same** **revenue** **definition** the **quarterly** **board** **book** and **the** **external** **investor** **summary** use; when **the** two **differ** **on** **purpose**, **name** the **KPI** **after** the **stricter** **or** **more** **conservative** **view** **and** **avoid** **mixing** **them** in **one** **net**-**of**-**line**-**item** **tile** without **a** **reconciliation** **panel** **beside** **it** **.
grandmaExplanation: We line up the few headline numbers leadership watches against the annual plan in one screen, so the team sees the same story the finance chief will tell the board before the printed book lands.
